question: What is the total revenue per category for customers in the USA?
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE c.country = 'USA' AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category

question: What is the total number of products sold per order for completed orders?
sql: SELECT o.id AS order_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_products_sold FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY o.id

question: How many orders were cancelled by each customer?
sql: SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS cancelled_orders FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'cancelled' GROUP BY c.id, c.name
notes: Counting cancelled orders with GROUP BY

question: What is the total revenue per category for customers in the USA?
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE c.country = 'USA' AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category;

question: What is the trend of completed orders over the past year by month?
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, COUNT(o.id) AS completed_orders FROM orders o WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= DATE '2022-01-01' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
notes: Time series analysis using date formatting

question: Which products have generated the most revenue in total?
sql: SELECT p.id, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

question: What is the average order value per customer for completed orders in the last year?
sql: SELECT c.id, c.name, AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS average_order_value FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= DATE '2022-01-01' GROUP BY c.id, c.name
notes: Involves JOINs and aggregation with a date filter

question: What is the total revenue per category for customers in the USA?
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE c.country = 'USA' AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category

question: What is the total revenue generated from each product for all orders with a 'pending' status?
sql: SELECT p.id, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'pending' GROUP BY p.id, p.name
notes: Revenue calculation for pending orders using JOINs

question: Which products have been ordered the most in each category in the last six months?
sql: SELECT p.category, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.order_date >= DATE '2023-03-01' GROUP BY p.category, p.name ORDER BY p.category, total_quantity DESC
notes: GROUP BY with ordering on categories and quantities
